## 2024-05-24 - Prevent reverse tabnabbing in external links
**Vulnerability:** Links generated by PlateJS with `target="_blank"` were missing `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
**Learning:** `packages/link/src/lib/utils/getLinkAttributes.ts` processes all link attributes. Enhancing security globally is effective here.
**Prevention:** Unconditionally add `rel="noopener noreferrer"` to external links opening in new tabs to prevent malicious pages from exploiting `window.opener`.
